meaning: n.(女子名)伊莎贝拉的昵称
examples: Bella moaned that her feet were cold.
She was known to all and sundry as Bella.
Mr. Ben Bella was deposed in a coup in 1965.
Most people dress up to go out - the bella figura (looking good) is important.
Take it from psychologist Bella DePaulo, who has authored a dozen studies on deception.
